body.name: v2.0.0 — Breaking changes to /pets
body.body:
## Breaking Changes
- Removed `GET /pets/{petId}/owner` endpoint
- `petId` path parameter is now UUID instead of integer

## New Features
- Added `POST /pets` for creating pets
- Added pagination support via `X-Cursor` header

body.name: v1.0.0 — Initial release
body.body:
## Initial Release
- `GET /pets` — list all pets
- `GET /pets/{petId}` — get single pet
- `GET /health` — health check
